zh.Beaucé, Ille-Et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Franc: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉波奧瑟
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Villebéon於大約1240年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內維爾貝時，她的父親Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon32歲，母親Alix de Garlande26歲。她於大約1263年與Robert de Dreux結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1282年享年44歲。

zh-hans.Beaucé, Ille-Et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Franc: 法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉波奧瑟
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Villebéon于大约1240年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內維爾貝时，她的父亲Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon32岁，母亲Alix de Garlande26岁。她于大约1263年与Robert de Dreux结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1282年享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Villebéon was born about 1240, in Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, France, her father, Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon, was 32 and her mother, Alix de Garlande, was 26. She married Robert de Dreux about 1263. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1282, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Villebéon est née environ 1240, à Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alix de Garlande, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Dreux environ 1263. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1282, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Villebéon um 1240 in Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon 32 und ihre Mutter Alix de Garlande 26. Sie hat um 1263 Robert de Dreux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1282 im Alter von 44 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Villebéon è nata il circa 1240 nel Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, sua padre, Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alix de Garlande, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Dreux circa 1263. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1282, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Villebéonが約1240年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンヴィレブeオンで生まれた時，父Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéonは32歳，母Alix de Garlandeは26歳であった。約1263年にRobert de Dreuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1282年に44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Villebéon(이)가 대략 1240년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 비레브e에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Garlande(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1263년 Robert de Dreux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1282년 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.aproximadamente 1240–aproximadamente 128: tany ho any amin'ny 1240–tany ho any amin'ny 1282

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Villebéon nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Garlande, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Dreux aproximadamente 1263. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1282, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Villebéon родилась около 1240 г. в местности виллебeон, сине-ет-марн, Франция, её отцу по имени Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alix de Garlande, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Dreux около 1263 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1282 г. в возрасте 44 лет.

sm.aproximadamente 1240–aproximadamente 128: e tusa o le 1240–e tusa o le 1282

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Villebéon nació aproximadamente 1240, en Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alix de Garlande, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Robert de Dreux aproximadamente 1263. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1282, a la edad de 44 años.
